name: SMART on FHIR Demo
description: A ~110-line SMART on FHIR app that launches inside a sandbox EHR, reads the patient and their observations, and writes a clinical note back — handling the addendum-vs-edit distinction EHRs treat differently in the wild. Most public SMART demos only read; this one writes back, which is where the interesting integration questions live.

name: FolioXtracker
description: Self-hosted investment portfolio tracker and rebalancer. Records trades across crypto and equity platforms, normalises everything to AUD, fetches daily prices from Yahoo Finance, and gives buy-only rebalance recommendations against category targets. Broker file imports, IMAP auto-import of trade confirmations, runs on Vercel or a Raspberry Pi.
